name: Bread Griddle Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix bread crumbs and milk in a bowl until well combined.
2. Add eggs, flour, salt, melted butter, and baking powder to the breadcrumb mixture. Stir gently until all ingredients are incorporated.
3. Heat a griddle or non-stick pan over medium heat. When hot, add a small amount of melted butter to coat the surface.
4. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter onto the heated griddle for each cake.
5. Cook until golden brown on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
6. Serve with butter and syrup.
